meta.title: Flash Systems Ltd | Elite B2B Software & Consulting
meta.description: Strategic technical solutions and financial software architecture. World-class British engineering at intelligent rates — custom software, FinTech, and enterprise consulting.

footer.description: Elite B2B software consultancy delivering world-class British engineering for enterprises that demand precision, security, and measurable ROI — without the overhead of traditional agencies.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Flash Systems Ltd. All rights reserved.
footer.legalLine: Flash Systems Ltd | Company No: 17307106 | Registered in England & Wales.

brand.name: Flash Systems Ltd
brand.description: Elite B2B software consultancy delivering world-class British engineering for enterprises that demand precision, security, and measurable ROI — without the overhead of traditional agencies.
brand.tagline: Strategic Technical Solutions & Financial Software Architecture
brand.heroSubtext: We architect, build, and scale mission-critical software and financial systems for organisations that cannot afford mediocrity. Senior engineers. Rigorous delivery. Intelligent cost structures designed for maximum return.

services.title: Three pillars of elite delivery
services.description: We concentrate on high-impact disciplines where engineering rigour and financial intelligence intersect — delivering outcomes that scale with your business, not against it.

items.title: Custom Software Development
items.description: End-to-end product engineering led by senior British-trained developers — from cloud-native platforms to complex enterprise applications built for longevity and scale.
highlights: Senior full-stack engineers with enterprise delivery experience
API design, microservices, and platform modernisation
Dedicated squads or embedded engineers — your model, our rigour

items.title: FinTech & Payment Solutions
items.description: Secure, compliant payment infrastructure and financial software engineered for high-volume transactions, regulatory scrutiny, and zero-compromise reliability.
highlights: Payment gateway integration and orchestration layers
Real-time settlement, reconciliation, and reporting systems
Scalable backends designed for financial-grade uptime

items.title: Technical & Financial Consulting
items.description: Strategic advisory that bridges engineering and finance — optimising technology spend, accelerating delivery, and aligning technical roadmaps with commercial outcomes.
highlights: Technology due diligence and architecture reviews

value.title: World-class quality. Intelligent economics.
value.descriptionBefore: occupies a rare position in the market: British software engineering standards at highly optimised rates. Elite senior developers from
value.descriptionAfter: — engineered for maximum ROI without compromising on craft, security, or accountability.

items.title: British Engineering Excellence
items.description: Our delivery standard reflects world-class British software craftsmanship — disciplined processes, clean architecture, and engineering culture that enterprise CTOs trust.

items.title: Intelligent Cost Optimisation
items.description: Access elite senior developers starting at highly optimised rates of $30–$40/hr — delivering top-tier output at a fraction of traditional agency costs for maximum ROI.

items.title: Enterprise Security & Compliance
items.description: Financial-grade security practices, rigorous code review, and compliance-aware delivery for regulated industries and high-stakes platforms.

items.title: Strategic Partnership Model
items.description: We operate as an extension of your leadership team — transparent communication, accountable milestones, and outcomes measured in business impact, not slide decks.

cta.title: Ready to architect your next platform?
cta.description: Partner with {{brandName}} for strategic technical leadership, financial software architecture, and delivery teams that operate at the highest standard — at a cost structure built for ROI.

corporate.title: Strategic Excellence & Governance
corporate.legalStatus: Flash Systems Ltd is a private company limited by shares, incorporated in England and Wales (Company Number: 17307106).
corporate.commitment: We operate under stringent British corporate governance standards — prioritising engineering integrity, fiduciary responsibility, and long-term client partnership over short-term delivery metrics.

serviceRequest.metaTitle: Express Service Portal | Flash Systems Ltd
serviceRequest.metaDescription: Submit an express service request for technical consultation, software development, or code review — secure PayPal payment and rapid response.
serviceRequest.title: Fast-track your technical request
serviceRequest.intro: Select your service, describe your project brief, and complete payment via PayPal. Our team reviews every submission and responds within 24 hours.
serviceRequest.formIntro: Complete all fields below. Payment is enabled once your request details are provided.
serviceRequest.securePaymentDescription: Payments are processed via PayPal. Your project brief is sent to our team before you are redirected to complete payment.

form.projectBriefPlaceholder: Outline your objectives, current stack, timeline, and any constraints our team should know…
form.payHint: Select a service type and provide your project brief to enable payment.
form.errorRequired: Please select a service and complete your project brief.
form.errorNotConfigured: Notifications are not configured yet. Please contact us directly.
form.errorPayPal: PayPal payment link is not configured. Please contact us to complete your request.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.
form.successMessage: Your request has been received. Our team will review your project and contact you within 24 hours.

contact.metaTitle: Start a Project | Flash Systems Ltd
contact.metaDescription: Submit a project enquiry to Flash Systems Ltd — elite B2B software development, FinTech architecture, and strategic consulting.
contact.title: Let's discuss your technical objectives
contact.intro: Complete the form below and our partnerships team will respond within one business day. We work with enterprises and growth-stage companies on mission-critical software and financial systems.
contact.formIntro: All fields required. Typical engagements range from focused consulting to multi-year platform builds.

form.projectScopePlaceholder: Describe your technical objectives, timeline, and any compliance or integration requirements…
form.privacy: By submitting, you agree to be contacted regarding your enquiry. We never share your data with third parties.
form.errorRequired: Please complete all fields before submitting.
form.errorEmail: Please enter a valid work email address.
form.errorNotConfigured: The contact form is not configured yet. Please email us directly or try again later.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
form.successMessage: We will review your project details and contact you shortly.
